channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The Future of Cross-Platform Development: Uno Platform Studio Unveiled
item.description: Uno Platform Studio, a suite of developer productivity tools, is set to revolutionize cross-platform .NET app development with features like Hot Design and Hot Reload.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: AI’s data problem: How to build the right foundation
item.description: 2024 was undoubtedly “the year of AI,” with businesses across the globe attempting to fast-track implementations. In fact, EY’s 2024 Work Reimagined Survey found that Generative AI (GenAI) adoption skyrocketed from 22% in 2023 to 75% in 2024.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Australia's social media ban for kids is closer to becoming law
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Australia’s House of Representatives on Wednesday passed a bill that would ban children younger than 16 years old from social media, leaving it to the Senate to finalize the world-first law.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Python to C: What’s new in Cython 3.1
item.description: Cython is the most convenient way to bridge C and Python languages and tools in Python programs. Developers use it to write C extensions or wrap C libraries for use in Python. Now, a major new release is on the way.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: A software developer gives thanks
item.description: Tomorrow, we in the US celebrate Thanksgiving. So today seemed like a good time for me to recognize the people and technologies in the software development world that I’m most thankful for.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: This TikTok user says a popular YouTube music channel is in fact AI
item.description: Are you really a student if you’ve not done a late night study session soundtracked to an unending lo-fi beats playlist on YouTube? According to Google Trends, searches for the term “lo-fi” on YouTube have tripled since 2020.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: AI PCs for federal: The future of edge computing
item.description: How AI PCs supplemented by extreme search capabilities will enable federal employees at the edge to leverage more data to make better decisions, faster. The post AI PCs for federal: The future of edge computing first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: This free time-zone conversion tool blows other clock apps out of the water
item.description: You’d think by this point in our lives, we’d have the whole time-zone-conversion thing figured out. It isn’t all that complicated, right?! And yet—well, trying to keep such calculations straight often feels like performing advanced algebra.
item.dc:creator: JR Raphael, Fast Company

item.title: Cisco, NTT Data partner to simplify private 5G connectivity
item.description: Cisco and NTT Data are extending their partnership to offer customers more streamlined options for deploying private 5G services for enterprise connectivity. The partnership ties Cisco’s networking technologies to NTT Data’s Transatel network.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Biden administration preliminarily OKs $6.6B loan to EV maker Rivian
item.description: The Biden administration has preliminarily said it would give a $6.6 billion loan to electric vehicle (EV) maker Rivian for a plant in Georgia.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, The Hill

item.title: Lauren Boebert Cameo page disappears amid House ethics concerns
item.description: Rep. Lauren Boebert (R-Colo.) briefly offered videos on Cameo, a website on which public figures sell personalized videos to fans, before the page went offline amid questions about whether it would have violated House ethics rules.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, The Hill

item.title: Build generative AI pipelines without the infrastructure headache
item.description: While creating a basic ChatGPT prototype might take a weekend, developing production-ready generative AI systems that securely handle enterprise data presents significantly greater engineering challenges.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Mulvaney calls DOGE a 'PR campaign,' but respects Musk, Ramaswamy's attempt to reform government
item.description: Former White House chief of staff Mick Mulvaney called the inaugural Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) a “PR campaign,” in a Monday interview, but said he respects the efforts by its appointed leaders, Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy, to reform the federal government.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: Unlocking the Power of AI in Travel Planning: A Game-Changer for Your Next Getaway
item.description: Discover how artificial intelligence can revolutionize your travel planning experience with tailored itineraries, unique experiences, and simplified logistics.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Khanna says Democrats will work with Musk's DOGE on cutting defense budget
item.description: Rep. Ro Khanna (D-Calif.) on Monday suggested that Democrats could work with tech billionaire Elon Musk’s “Department of Government Efficiency” (DOGE) on cutting the defense budget. The issue came up during an interview Khanna gave to CNN anchor Jim Acosta, who noted the new efficiency panel.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: North Korean hackers use disguised apps to target Macs with hidden malware
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says North Korean hackers hide malware in macOS apps, bypassing Mac security checks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How to use iPhone's mic mode for crystal-clear, noise-free calls
item.description: Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reveals how iPhone’s new Automatic Mic Mode adjusts settings for optimal call quality automatically.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dell adds to PowerEdge server lineup
item.description: Dell Technologies introduced new hardware products and services at two separate conferences, the Supercomputing 24 show in Atlanta and Microsoft’s Ignite conference.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: GitHub Copilot: Everything you need to know
item.description: In 2014, Microsoft Research released an experimental Bing Code Search add-on for Visual Studio and the web. It was a code snippet search tool for C# with a natural language interface, using an index of code from Stack Overflow, MSDN, Dotnetperls, and CSharp411, powered by Bing, running on Azure.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Don’t get caught in the 'Apple ID suspended' phishing scam
item.description: Even the most tech-savvy computer users have to think twice with some of the clever phishing emails scammers are coming up with these days.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: JDK 24: The new features in Java 24
item.description: In the wake of Java Development Kit (JDK) 23, which arrived September 17, work now focuses on the planned successor release, JDK 24, which has ballooned to 24 proposed features. The four most recent additions include warnings upon the use of memory-access methods in sun.misc.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Thai court dismisses activist's suit against Israeli spyware producer over lack of evidence
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — A Thai court on Thursday threw out a lawsuit brought by a pro-democracy activist which alleged spyware produced by an Israeli tech firm had been used to hack his phone.
item.dc:creator: JERRY HARMER and DAVID RISING, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How to protect your deliveries from getting stolen by porch pirates
item.description: Porch pirates are on the prowl this holiday season. Tech guru Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson has a number of tips to prevent holiday package thefts.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
